title: ImportContainer
description: A container that groups related import requests for a specific resource type.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the container (2-256 characters).

version.description: Current version of the import container.

resourceType.description: The resource type this container is scoped to (e.g., 'product', 'category').

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the container was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the container was last modified.
